mapper.select: select id, window_days, lv2_sign_in_days, lv3_sign_in_days, enabled, updated_by, update_time from user_level_rule_config where config_key = 'DEFAULT' limit 1
mapper.update: update user_level_rule_config set window_days = #{windowDays}, lv2_sign_in_days = #{lv2SignInDays}, lv3_sign_in_days = #{lv3SignInDays}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{updatedBy, jdbcType=BINARY, typeHandler=com.nowcoder.community.infra.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, update_time = current_timestamp where config_key = 'DEFAULT'
mapper.insert: insert into user_level_rule_config( id, config_key, window_days, lv2_sign_in_days, lv3_sign_in_days, enabled, updated_by, update_time ) values ( #{id, jdbcType=BINARY, typeHandler=com.nowcoder.community.infra.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, 'DEFAULT', #{windowDays}, #{lv2SignInDays}, #{lv3SignInDays}, #{enabled}, #{updatedBy, jdbcType=BINARY, typeHandler=com.nowcoder.community.infra.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, current_timestamp )
